response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth in distributed systems, real-time processing, and recent exposure to AI agent infrastructure at Google, his resume lacks explicit experience in senior technical leadership, scaling engineering teams (10 to 30+), and operating AI systems in regulated financial environments, which are critical requirements for an executive CTO role at a scale-up.
strengths: Deep expertise in backend, distributed systems, and event-driven architectures.
Experience as a Staff/Senior Engineer at Google and Meta, indicating a high technical bar.
Direct involvement with AI agent infrastructure and tooling at a leading tech company.
concerns: Lacks demonstrated senior technical leadership and organizational scaling experience (10 to 30+ engineers).
Limited explicit experience operating AI systems in regulated financial or high-stakes commercial environments.
Fintech infrastructure familiarity is not at the depth required for core credit and payment systems.
